heroSubtitle: Quick and easy car sale. We buy most car types in almost any condition.
heroSubtitle2: Fast quote • Simple paperwork • Payment on the spot
problemText: Ads, bargaining, endless calls, no-shows… We keep it simple: send the details, get an offer, and if it works for you—we handle the rest.
serviceIntro1: Simple process: contact → quote → inspection → paperwork → payment.
service4Item1: Send the car details and a few photos
service4Item2: We call you back to confirm the key info
service3Item1: Valuation for multiple vehicles in one go
ref1: Petrol, diesel and hybrid passenger cars – most brands
ref3: Vans and light commercial vehicles (upon agreement)
testimonial1Text: “Fast response, fair offer, and everything was done in a day.”
testimonial2Text: “They helped with paperwork too. Smooth and professional.”
testimonial3Text: “They bought my damaged car and arranged transport. Great communication.”
aboutText: Our goal is simple: make selling your car stress-free. Quick offers, flexible scheduling, and help with paperwork—so you can just hand over the car and get paid.
contactSubtitle: Send the car details (model, year, mileage, condition) and your contact info—we’ll get back with an offer soon.
ctaBlockText: Call or message us with a few details, and we’ll send a fair quote.
metaDescription: Nationwide car buying with fast, fair handling. Quote in ~15 minutes, paperwork help, payment on the spot.
ogTitle: Sell your car fast – fair offer & instant payment
ogDescription: Send details and photos – get a quick offer, simple paperwork, paid on the spot.
modal-subtitle: Enter your email and we’ll send a 7-point checklist to help you sell faster and for a better price.
thanks-text:
We’ve sent the checklist to your email.
Please also check your Promotions/Spam folder.
termsServicesText: This website is used for requesting car-buying offers and customer communication.
termsPaymentText: Payment is agreed individually in each case (cash or bank transfer).
termsGoverningLaw: These terms are governed by the law of the provider’s registered seat.
